product_overview: Coturne ("Roomies") is a mobile-first roommate matching platform that helps users discover compatible roommates through profiles, lifestyle tags, swipe-based matching, and private chat. The backend also supports dynamic sitemap generation and a queued email processing job for transactional/authentication messaging.
core_goals: Enable secure user onboarding and profile creation for roommate discovery
Provide a swipe-based matching experience with compatibility scoring
Support real-time communication between mutually matched users
Maintain safe and reliable backend operations for SEO and queued email delivery

features.name: Sitemap API
features.description: Dynamically generates the sitemap.xml so search engines can discover the main public pages of the app.
user_flows: GET /sitemap.xml -> Receive 200 XML response containing main page URLs for indexing
GET /sitemap.xml with an invalid route configuration -> Receive an error response or malformed XML indicating sitemap generation failed

features.name: Email Queue Process API
features.description: Processes queued transactional and authentication emails from Supabase pgmq in secure batches.
user_flows: POST /lovable/email/queue/process with valid Authorization header -> Receive 200 confirming queued emails were processed in batch -> Transactional/authentication emails are delivered from the queue
POST /lovable/email/queue/process without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized and no emails are processed
POST /lovable/email/queue/process with invalid or insufficient permissions -> Receive 403 Forbidden and queue processing is denied
POST /lovable/email/queue/process when server configuration is missing or invalid -> Receive 500 Server configuration error

features.name: Email Queue Process API
features.description: Processes the queued transactional and authentication emails from Supabase pgmq
